mechanism: A flat Phillips Curve means output gaps produce minimal inflation, allowing the cycle to extend without triggering the inflation → rate hike → recession sequence. This stretches the Stage 1 to peak timing beyond historical norms but creates nonlinear re-steepening tail risk.
regime_dependence: Active at current Phillips slope of 0.10-0.15. If slope re-steepens (as in 2021-22 under supply shock + demand stimulus), cycle extension mechanism breaks.
